topic: Elon Musk to Owe Billions After Jury Finds He Misled Twitter.

framework.structure: ['How to'] + [Aspirational Outcome] + ['using'] + [Unexpected Free or Unknown Method]
framework.trigger: Effort gap — same result with a fraction of the work, and almost nobody knows this exists
framework.example: How to automate your entire Monday morning using one free AI tool nobody is using.

script.hook: How to automate your entire Monday morning using one free AI tool nobody is using.
script.body: Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them.
script.cta: Comment KNEW if you already knew this.

full_script_text: How to automate your entire Monday morning using one free AI tool nobody is using. Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them. Comment KNEW if you already knew this.
